Notice Of Motion To Comel Discovery; Sanctions Requested
Off Calendar Nov-14-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
J. Cross Creason, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Safeway Supermarket

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Safeway Inc.'s motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and attendance at deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 10 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff is also ordered to contact counsel for defendant to schedule his deposition. The deposition shall be completed within 30 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $950.20 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
